title: polyscias cissodendron
intro: Polyscias cissodendron is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, commonly known as the 'Tahina' or 'Uva de Goma'. It is a tropical plant native to Madagascar and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits such as antioxidant and anti-oxidative stress properties. Herbal preparations of Polyscias cissodendron include tea, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
